DROP ALL AGGREGATE agg_func_1, agg_func_2 CASCADE;
DROP ALL AGGREGATE (SELECT aggregate_function_name FROM sys.functions WHERE type = 3);
DROP ALL AGGREGATE (SELECT DISTINCT aggregate_name FROM sys.functions WHERE schema_name = 'myschema' AND type = 3);
DROP ALL AGGREGATE (SELECT aggregate_name FROM sys.functions WHERE aggregate_name LIKE 'test%') CASCADE;
